bio.heading: Who is Cerine?
description:
I'm Cerine, a dynamic full-stack developer with nearly 3 years in the tech industry. My path is paved with curiosity and a drive to innovate, pushing the boundaries to create engaging, user-focused digital experiences.
Beyond the keyboard, I'm a storyteller through photography, an adventurer in the realms of literature, and an artist with a paintbrush. Every day is a new opportunity to learn and evolve, inspired by the blend of technology and the art found in the world around us.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: At Hatta, an e-commerce platform, I build modules with PrestaShop to simplify logistics tasks and contribute to innovative e-payment solutions, all while maintaining a smooth website and back office.

experience.title: Lead Full Stack Developer
experience.description: My passion for mentorship fuels my commitment to guide junior developers, sharing best practices and fostering a culture of continuous learning and growth. This combination of technical expertise and leadership enables me to lead successful projects and contribute meaningfully to any team.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: As a Full-Stack Developer at Thinline, I pride myself on crafting scalable solutions for diverse healthcare needs.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Played a key role in enhancing and expanding an existing mobile app, spearheading the development and implementation of new features based on user feedback.
